pi_items.source: task.json description section explicitly states: 'Create a document saved as invitation.docx in the Documents folder' and 'Save the file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\invitation.docx'

Task specifies 5 inches width. Microsoft Office standard: 1 inch = 1440 twips (confirmed by Microsoft documentation). Calculation: 5 inches × 1440 twips/inch = 7200 twips. Verified by verifier.py line 30 which defines EXPECTED_WIDTH = 7200.

Task specifies 7 inches height. Microsoft Office standard: 1 inch = 1440 twips. Calculation: 7 inches × 1440 twips/inch = 10080 twips. Verified by verifier.py line 31 which defines EXPECTED_HEIGHT = 10080.

Task specifies 0.5 inches margins on all sides. Microsoft Office standard: 1 inch = 1440 twips. Calculation: 0.5 inches × 1440 twips/inch = 720 twips. Verified by verifier.py line 32 which defines EXPECTED_MARGIN = 720.
Task description Content section line 1 explicitly lists 'SAVE THE DATE' as required text.
Task description Content section lists 'Summit Innovations' as required text.
Task description Content section lists '10th Anniversary Gala' as required text.
Task description Content section lists 'Saturday, October 12, 2024' as required text.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a formal invitation card document saved as 'invitation.docx' with specifications: page size 5×7 inches (7200×10080 twips), 0.5-inch margins (720 twips), and vertical center alignment. Required text content includes 'SAVE THE DATE', 'Summit Innovations', '10th Anniversary Gala', and 'Saturday, October 12, 2024'. All metadata values have been verified against task specifications and Microsoft Office measurement standards (1 inch = 1440 twips). The data is entirely synthetic, representing a fictional invitation event with no real external data sources.
